Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
183 
HPSA_SCRCTY_IND_CD 
LABEL: 
Carrier Line Health Professional Shortage Area (HPSA)/Scarcity Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code used to track health professional shortage area (HPSA) and physician scarcity bonus 
payments on carrier claims. 
SHORT NAME: HPSASCCD 
LONG NAME: HPSA_SCRCTY_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
1 = HPSA 
2 = Scarcity 
3 =
